mapper.sql: id, course_id as courseId, inviter_member_id as inviterMemberId, invitee_member_id as inviteeMemberId, status, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO course_invitations ( course_id, inviter_member_id, invitee_member_id, status, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{courseId}, #{inviterMemberId}, #{inviteeMemberId}, #{status}, current_timestamp, current_timestamp )
mapper.select: SELECT FROM course_invitations WHERE course_id = #{courseId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT course_id FROM course_invitations WHERE invitee_member_id = #{inviteeMemberId} AND status = 'ACCEPTED' ORDER BY updated_at DESC
